name: YouTube MCP
description: Manages YouTube via MCP — search videos, retrieve statistics and captions, list channel content and playlists, upload videos, and update metadata.

skills.name: Video Search
skills.description: Searches YouTube for videos, channels, or playlists using a query and filters by type, publishing date, and results per page.

skills.name: Caption Extraction
skills.description: Downloads caption tracks from YouTube videos in SRT, SBV, or VTT format for transcript analysis or translation.

skills.name: Channel Analytics
skills.description: Retrieves subscriber counts, view counts, and video statistics for any YouTube channel by ID or handle.
